title: Elemon Animated 'Edutainment' Series Gets 2nd Season
content: Toei Animation and Sunlight Entertainment began streaming a new trailer last Friday for their animated "edutainment" series ELEMON , and it reveals that the show is getting a second season titled ELEMON Breakthrough . Episodes streamed weekly on the ELEMON YouTube channel .
author: ANN

title: Bleach Teases New 2026 Story
content: The Soul Society is preparing to say goodbye to the Thousand-Year Blood War this year as Bleach and Studio Pierrot are preparing for the final anime part of the beloved television show’s comeback.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll to Stream Haibara's Teenage New Game+, RILAKKUMA, The Classroom of a Black Cat and a Witch, More Anime
content: • Always a Catch! — April 1 • Haibara's Teenage New Game+ (pictured right) — April 2 • Killed Again, Mr. Detective?. — April 2 • RILAKKUMA — April 3 • Ace of Diamond Act II Second Season — April 5 • My Ribdiculous Reincarnation (Megami "Isekai Tensei Nani ni Naritai Desu ka" Ore "Yūsha no Rokkotsu de") — April 7 •…
author: ANN

title: The Fable TV Anime Gets 2nd Season
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Katsuhisa Minami 's The Fable manga announced on Thursday that the series is getting a second season with returning cast and staff members.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Finale Hints Gojo Is Coming Back Soon (And You Missed It)
content: While Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 was one of the best seasons, if not the best, there is no denying that without Gojo, something major felt missing. Gojo Satoru, established as the strongest in the Jujutsu world, is the ultimate nuclear weapon against curse users and cursed spirits.
author: ComicBook

title: The Simpsons Reveals Plans to Celebrate Its Greatest Meme With Anniversary Event
content: The Simpsons has spent decades following the residents of Springfield, and in doing so, has had a major effect on both the worlds of pop culture and the real world. Such is the case with the landscape of “memes” as both classic and current jokes for the long-running animated series have been highlighted across the…
author: ComicBook

title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man Creator Shares Promising Update on Season 2 Release
content: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man is currently in the works on its highly anticipated second season for Disney+, and the creator behind it all has shared a promising update on how the new episodes are coming along.
author: ComicBook

title: 'The Fable' Gets Second Season
content: Production company VAP announced a second season for the The Fable television anime on Thursday. The new season will adapt the Yamaoka-hen ( Yamaoka Arc ). The official website also revealed the returning cast and staff, along with a teaser visual (pictured).
author: MyAnimeList

title: 6th Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199 Film's Teaser Previews Plot Twist
content: The official X/Twitter account for Yamato yo Towa ni: Rebel 3199 ( Be Forever Yamato : Rebel 3199), the latest project in the Space Battleship Yamato remakes, revealed on Wednesday a teaser video and visual for the sixth film Aoi Meikyū (Blue Labyrinth).
author: ANN

title: Dragon Ball Breaks Hearts With The Perfect April Fools Prank
content: It’s April Fool’s Day, and the entertainment world isn’t immune to succumbing to hilarious pranks and wild news stories that turn out not to be true. Much like the worlds of television and movies, the anime industry will often take part in the festivities by creating hilarious jokes that play on its franchises.
author: ComicBook
